description: 프로세스 현황 SoT. 세션 시작/종료 시 반드시 업데이트. 구조명세·이슈·리소스를 유기적으로 링크.

current_work.title: UC-017 — Codex main provider·동적 도구·Discord 터미널 위임

windows_runtime_acceptance.change: Windows global npm Codex uses codex.cmd through cmd.exe; POSIX keeps the codex executable.
verified: 79 targeted Codex, LLM-role, and Discord contract/integration tests
real signed-in Codex app-server response with completed and usage events
windows_runtime_acceptance.runtime: naia-agent restarted from the new build and listening on 127.0.0.1:50051.
windows_runtime_acceptance.known_limit: Windows Tauri WebDriver cannot create a WebView2 session (DevToolsActivePort), so the live Shell Codex UI E2E remains blocked before application code runs.
windows_runtime_acceptance.full_suite_note: The full agent suite still has pre-existing Windows portability failures outside this Codex change (Discord lock/path, gRPC proto path, and memory-header cases).

jeonju_course_vertical_acceptance.contract: Shell persists one strict Discord course target at the ADK control root; the next Agent start loads it and accepts only the fixed index.html and hero.svg selected-workspace boundary.
verified: 89 targeted Agent tests including Discord lifecycle partial-retry and target-file strict-load coverage
isolated Gateway integration: get_time, authorized /course, received/running/completed lifecycle, durable dedupe, and source-message reply targeting
paired native Tauri Shell E2E: saved target UI, initial course task, revision task, and student Git boundary
jeonju_course_vertical_acceptance.review: Final adversarial review found no remaining P0/P1 issue.
jeonju_course_vertical_acceptance.operational_boundary: The external Discord bot network smoke remains an opt-in credentialed operation; it was not represented as a completed automated test.

current_work.handoff_note: Codex app-server 동적 도구 호출, handled 단일 실행, desktop Codex-only/workspace-bound 위임, Discord 비밀 없는 직렬 진행 메시지와 실제 Codex dynamic-tool smoke를 구현·검증했다.
current_work.prior_work_note: REQ-013 선제 발화와 REQ-014 Discord runtime은 보존됐다. 실제 Discord 자격증명 2채널·OS credential store·현장 리허설은 운영 인수 범위다.

P01.name: user_scenarios
P01.deliverable: Codex main/sub 역할과 Discord 진행 관찰 시나리오

P02.name: test_scenarios
P02.deliverable: dynamic RPC·단일 실행·경로 경계·진행 egress 계약

P04.name: integration_test
P04.deliverable: 계약/통합 전체 회귀와 실제 Codex dynamic-tool smoke

P05.name: requirements_complete
P05.deliverable: REQ-015 자동 검증 범위 Done; 실제 Discord 자격증명은 운영 인수로 분리
